# Test Case Design - Diagnostics

High-level test cases for the **Diagnostics** architecture model. Diagnostics: DTC management, freeze frames, UDS services and monitors.

---
## Test Case: TC.001 - dtc init & cyclic

**Given** the ECU has powered on
**When** `Diag_Dtc_Init` then `Diag_Dtc_Step` are called
**Then** the phase becomes RUN and `value` is a filtered, clamped sample (REQ-DIAG-DTC7)
